other_observers: Dan Maynard and I think 11 members of a CFO field trip
description: Bird flew in and looked like a Turkey Vulture both in size and flight style but only seen briefly in flight before landing in a Cottonwood.  When perched, all dark (black) bird minus a few "gray" spots on the belly area.  The undertail also appeared gray/white when perched.  The cere was bright yellow as were the legs (probably still are).  When the bird took off the underwings were "white" with dark barring as was the spread tail.  This gave the tail a gray appearance.
photographer: Photographer: Mark Peterson, Mark Peterson, Mark Peterson
